questions.question: Y a-t-il des informations contradictoires sur ISF ?

claim1.text: ISF supports the use of logon tickets for SSO when using a Web browser as the front-end client.
claim1.verbatim: ISF supports the use of logon tickets for SSO when using a Web browser as the front-end client.

claim2.text: SAP S/4HANA supports the use of logon tickets for SSO when using a Web browser as the front-end client.
claim2.verbatim: SAP S/4HANA supports the use of logon tickets for SSO when using a Web browser as the front-end client.

entities: SAP Incentive and Sales Force Management (ISF)

questions.question: Les documents sont-ils coherents concernant SAP ECC software ?

claim1.text: SAP Field Service Management enables field service organizations to integrate with SAP ECC software.
claim1.verbatim:
8015530 SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP ERP

SAP® Field Service Management, connector for SAP ERP is an add-on that enables field service organizations to integrate seamlessly with SAP® ECC software or SAP S/4HANA® customer service (comparability mode), plant maintenance and projects.

claim2.text: SAP Field Service Management is integrated with Service using SAP Cloud Integration and SAP Cloud Connector.
claim2.verbatim: SAP Field Service Management is integrated with Service using SAP Cloud Integration and SAP Cloud Connector.

questions.question: Quelles tensions existent dans le corpus sur PeriodEnd Valuation (PEV) ?

claim1.text: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the PeriodEnd Valuation (PEV).
claim1.verbatim: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the PeriodEnd Valuation (PEV) , in the Versioned Persistency of Logistics Pricing Data (VLOGP), BRFplus Decision Table Entries for CPE Formula Assembly , and in Pricing Condition Records in CPE Formula Assembly .

claim2.text: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in Pricing Condition Records in CPE Formula Assembly.
claim2.verbatim: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the PeriodEnd Valuation (PEV) , in the Versioned Persistency of Logistics Pricing Data (VLOGP), BRFplus Decision Table Entries for CPE Formula Assembly , and in Pricing Condition Records in CPE Formula Assembly .

claim1.text: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the BRFplus Decision Table Entries for CPE Formula Assembly.
claim1.verbatim: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the PeriodEnd Valuation (PEV) , in the Versioned Persistency of Logistics Pricing Data (VLOGP), BRFplus Decision Table Entries for CPE Formula Assembly , and in Pricing Condition Records in CPE Formula Assembly .

claim2.text: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the Versioned Persistency of Logistics Pricing Data (VLOGP).
claim2.verbatim: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the PeriodEnd Valuation (PEV) , in the Versioned Persistency of Logistics Pricing Data (VLOGP), BRFplus Decision Table Entries for CPE Formula Assembly , and in Pricing Condition Records in CPE Formula Assembly .

questions.question: Les documents sont-ils coherents concernant RFC ?

claim1.text: RFC calls take place from the Accounts Receivable system to the Dispute Case Processing system and vice versa in the ALE scenario of SAP Dispute Management.
claim1.verbatim: Note that in the ALE scenario of SAP Dispute Management , RFC calls take place from the Accounts Receivable system to the Dispute Case Processing system and vice versa.

claim2.text: SAP Dispute Management uses synchronous BAPI calls in a one-system scenario.
claim2.verbatim: If you are using SAP Dispute Management in a one-system scenario, synchronous BAPI calls are used instead.

questions.question: Quelles tensions existent dans le corpus sur versioned persistency of logistics pricing data ?

claim1.text: Transaction CMM_DEL_DOC_VERSIONS is used to display information about stored personal data in the versioned persistency of logistics pricing data (VLOGP) of Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales.

questions.question: Y a-t-il des informations contradictoires sur Dispute Case Processing system ?

claim1.text: IDocs are sent to the Dispute Case Processing system from the Accounts Receivable system when the clearing of items is reset.
claim1.verbatim: IDocs are sent to the Dispute Case Processing system from the Accounts Receivable system when items are cleared in the Accounts Receivable system, the clearing of items is reset, or partial payments are executed on items for which a promise to pay exists for the corresponding invoice.

claim2.text: SAP Dispute Management uses synchronous BAPI calls in a one-system scenario.
claim2.verbatim: If you are using SAP Dispute Management in a one-system scenario, synchronous BAPI calls are used instead.

questions.question: Y a-t-il des informations contradictoires sur SAP Dispute Management ?

claim1.text: SAP Dispute Management uses asynchronous BAPI calls between the systems involved.
claim1.verbatim: Note that in SAP Dispute Management , asynchronous BAPI calls, synchronous BAPI calls, and dialog calls take place between the systems involved.

claim2.text: RFC calls take place from the Accounts Receivable system to the Dispute Case Processing system and vice versa in the ALE scenario of SAP Dispute Management.
claim2.verbatim: Note that in the ALE scenario of SAP Dispute Management , RFC calls take place from the Accounts Receivable system to the Dispute Case Processing system and vice versa.

claim1.verbatim: • Planning procedure for supermarket (SUMA) scenario's: Planning Proce- dure assigned to the primary control cycle and secondary control cycles are the same.

claim2.text: For a primary control cycle with takt-based planning procedure, two-level replenishment planning through supermarket is possible.
claim2.verbatim: • For a primary control cycle with takt-based planning procedure, two-level replenishment planning through supermarket is possible.

questions.question: Quelles tensions existent dans le corpus sur SAP ECC software ?

claim1.verbatim:
8015530 SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP ERP

SAP® Field Service Management, connector for SAP ERP is an add-on that enables field service organizations to integrate seamlessly with SAP® ECC software or SAP S/4HANA® customer service (comparability mode), plant maintenance and projects.

claim2.text: SAP Field Service Management is integrated with Service using SAP Cloud Integration and SAP Cloud Connector.
claim2.verbatim: SAP Field Service Management is integrated with Service using SAP Cloud Integration and SAP Cloud Connector.

questions.question: Les documents sont-ils coherents concernant Dispute Case Processing system ?

claim1.text: IDocs are sent to the Dispute Case Processing system from the Accounts Receivable system when items are cleared.
claim1.verbatim: IDocs are sent to the Dispute Case Processing system from the Accounts Receivable system when items are cleared in the Accounts Receivable system, the clearing of items is reset, or partial payments are executed on items for which a promise to pay exists for the corresponding invoice.

claim2.text: IDocs are sent to the Dispute Case Processing system from the Accounts Receivable system when partial payments are executed on items.
